repo.description: A TensorFlow Implementation of DC-TTS: yet another text-to-speech model

terms.context_snippet: I implement yet another text-to-speech model, dc-tts, introduced in [Efficiently Trainable Text-to-Speech System Based on Deep Convolutional Networks with Guided Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/1710.08969).
